name: shallowswe-gpt-5-6-low-preview
description: Three GPT-5.6 low-effort rows, one each for Luna, Terra, and Sol, used for the exact 18-task N=3 preview matrix.

include: One regular non-Pro OpenRouter row for each GPT-5.6 capability tier: Luna, Terra, and Sol
Low effort for all three rows because Terra and Sol high-effort probes hit an OpenRouter/OpenAI encrypted-content continuation error
exclude: Pro aliases until regular Luna/Terra/Sol rows are inspected
Mixed effort sweeps until the low-effort tier preview has data
selection_policy.display_policy: Always display reasoning_effort. Each effort level is a separate model_config.
